summary: Iteration 190 Testing Complete - TidyCal Booking, Weekly Performance Report, Mobile Navigation Features. 12/12 backend tests passed (100%). All requested features verified working correctly.

issues: 'Missing API Keys' modal appears on all pages when logging in - expected behavior warning about optional integrations (Heartbeat, Publitio, OpenRouter)

FEATURE_2_tidycal_admin_settings_card.description: Admin Settings > API Keys tab has TidyCal Booking card with embed URL input field

FEATURE_3_booking_page_empty_state.description: Booking page (/booking) shows 'Booking calendar not configured yet' when no URL is set

FEATURE_4_book_a_call_nav_community.description: Sidebar shows 'Book a Call' nav item under COMMUNITY category

FEATURE_5_weekly_performance_report_api.description: GET /api/referrals/my-team/weekly-report returns report with total_trades, total_profit, win_rate, active_traders, prev_week comparison, member_breakdown

FEATURE_6_weekly_report_team_page.description: Team Page (/my-team) shows Weekly Performance Report section with Total Trades, Total Profit, Win Rate, Active Traders stats and week-over-week comparison

FEATURE_7_mobile_menu_book_a_call.description: Mobile menu includes 'Book a Call' navigation item

FEATURE_8_mobile_menu_my_team.description: Mobile menu includes 'My Team' in GROWTH category

FEATURE_9_mobile_menu_hub_store.description: Mobile menu includes 'Hub Store' in navigation items

FEATURE_10_dashboard_margin.description: Dashboard content area has proper 256px left margin (ml-64) matching sidebar width on desktop

FEATURE_11_mobile_bottom_nav.description: Mobile view shows bottom navigation bar with Home, Tracker, Trade, Heartbeat, Rewards tabs

FEATURE_12_sidebar_categories.description: Sidebar shows collapsible accordion categories: CORE, GROWTH, REWARDS, COMMUNITY, TOOLS, ADMIN

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing admin account iam@ryansalvador.com for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 190 complete. New features verified: (1) TidyCal Booking embed in Admin Settings API Keys tab with tidycal_embed_url field, (2) Booking page at /booking with empty state when URL not configured, (3) 'Book a Call' nav in sidebar under COMMUNITY category, (4) Weekly Performance Report on Team Page showing team trading stats with week-over-week comparison, (5) GET /api/referrals/my-team/weekly-report returns comprehensive report data, (6) Mobile menu includes Book a Call, My Team, Hub Store, (7) Dashboard has proper 256px left margin for sidebar, (8) Mobile bottom navigation works. All APIs are REAL (no mocks).
mocked_api_note: None. All endpoints are real implementations.
